title: Monarch KG disease-phenotype edges over HTTP
description: A foreign KG projection binding: read Monarch KGX TSV downloads over HTTP with DuckDB httpfs, normalize the edge file to SemanticSQL subject/predicate/object/attrs/trust, then query it as ordinary SQL. No Monarch-specific resolver; the host grants httpfs and the manifest declares the data URL.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from a read-only SELECT (here, DuckDB httpfs reads a Monarch KGX TSV file over HTTP).

params.sql: WITH kgx AS (SELECT * FROM read_csv_auto('https://data.monarchinitiative.org/monarch-kg/2026-04-14/tsv/all_associations/disease_to_phenotypic_feature_association.all.tsv.gz', delim='\t', header=true, compression='auto')) SELECT CAST(subject AS VARCHAR) AS subject, CAST(predicate AS VARCHAR) AS predicate, CAST("object" AS VARCHAR) AS "object", json_object('subject_label', subject_label, 'subject_category', subject_category, 'subject_taxon', subject_taxon, 'object_label', object_label, 'object_category', object_category, 'primary_knowledge_source', primary_knowledge_source, 'aggregator_knowledge_source', aggregator_knowledge_source, 'qualifiers', qualifiers, 'publications', publications, 'has_evidence', has_evidence) AS attrs, CASE WHEN coalesce(try_cast(negated AS BOOLEAN), false) THEN 0.0 ELSE 1.0 END AS trust FROM kgx WHERE subject IS NOT NULL AND predicate IS NOT NULL AND "object" IS NOT NULL AND coalesce(try_cast(negated AS BOOLEAN), false) = false AND subject = getvariable('disease_id')

operations.title: Disease phenotype edges from Monarch KG
operations.description: Return Monarch disease-to-phenotypic-feature edges for one disease CURIE. The resource is already normalized to SemanticSQL edge shape, so this operation is just SQL over the staged edge table.

sql.sqlTemplate: SELECT subject AS disease_id, json_extract_string(attrs, '$.subject_label') AS disease_label, "object" AS phenotype_id, json_extract_string(attrs, '$.object_label') AS phenotype_label, predicate, json_extract_string(attrs, '$.primary_knowledge_source') AS primary_source FROM monarch_disease_phenotype_edges WHERE subject = getvariable('disease_id') ORDER BY phenotype_id LIMIT coalesce(try_cast(getvariable('limit') AS INTEGER), 20)
